title: GraphView
description: Language-independent contract for the 3D force-directed node-graph viewer (graphlens). A domain-agnostic document of meta + nodes + links, consumed by the ptx-graphlens plugin (portunix-plugins #086) and the GraphLens3D React component (portunix-vscode #050). Files using this format use the '.glens.json' filename suffix. Distinct from the 2D Graph Canvas format (GraphFile: nodes + edges + metadata, '*.graph.json', portunix-vscode #030); this 3D format uses 'links' (not 'edges') and 'meta' (not 'metadata').

version.description: Optional document format version (semver), independent of the schema $version

meta.description: Viewer metadata; 'title' is the known key, other keys are allowed

title.description: Graph title shown by the viewer

id.description: Unique node id, referenced by link.source and link.target

meta.description: Free-form extra metadata for the detail panel

source.description: Source node id (must match a node.id)

target.description: Target node id (must match a node.id)
